verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a cry in my heart For Your glory to fall For Your presence to fill up my senses There's a yearning again A thirst for discipline A hunger for things that are deeper

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Could You take me beyond? Could You carry me through? If I open my heart, Could I go there with You?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For what do I have If I don't have You, Jesus What in this life Could mean any more You are my rock You are my glory You are the lifter Of my head Lifter of this head

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's a cry in my heart For Your glory to fall For Your presence to fill up my senses There's a yearning again A thirst for discipline A hunger for things that are deeper

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Could You take me beyond? Could You carry me through? If I open my heart, Could I go there with You?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For I've been here before But I know there's still more Oh, Lord, I need to know You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: For what do I have If I don't have You, Jesus What in this life Could mean any more? You are my rock You are my glory You are the lifter Of my head Lifter of this head
